_comment: Key Numbers section data (Milestone 10, section #key-numbers). Edit the values below to update the figures shown on the homepage — index.html contains no numeric values for this section, and assets/js/modules/counters.js never hardcodes them either; it only reads and renders whatever is in this file. 'animated' controls whether a stat counts up on scroll (set to false for non-numeric or fixed values, like availability).
